notes: Indirect TPBVP: fsolve on initial costates [lam_rx, lam_ry, lam_vx, lam_vy]. Cost integrated from u=-½λ_v. Residual is endpoint ||[r_f-r*; v_f-v*]||.
Direct transcription: segmented Bézier state, Gauss-Legendre collocation, IPOPT (MUMPS linear solver). Cost = Σ w_k |u_k|² Δt_seg.
Planar CR3BP TPBVP: fsolve on initial 4-vector costate [λ_rx, λ_ry, λ_vx, λ_vy]. Cost = ∫|u|² dt with u = -½λ_v.
Direct transcription (single-shot): segmented Bézier state, Gauss-Legendre collocation, CasADi+IPOPT (MUMPS).  Cold-start cost was 0.087804; warm-started from shooting to land in the PMP basin.

Best-of-15 rollup over all seeds. 1/15 converged at residual < 1e-4 (the arc-scaled early-stop threshold). Per-seed records are written with seed_strategy in {velocity_aligned, position_aligned, random_normal}.

burns_detected.name: Burn 1 (post-ICPS correction, not TLI; labeled by epoch-heuristic day_start<2)
burns_detected.total_dv_km_s_caveat: Sum of OEM |v_{i+1}-v_i| over burn window; includes gravity contribution, NOT physical scalar ΔV. See NARRATIVE §5.3.

burns_detected.name: Burn 2 (return-phase correction, not entry interface)
burns_detected.total_dv_km_s_caveat: Sum of OEM |v_{i+1}-v_i| over burn window; includes gravity contribution, NOT physical scalar ΔV. See NARRATIVE §5.3.
